meta.title: Viral Vibe — Digital Agency
meta.description: Digital agency from Niš — websites, web apps, e-commerce, social media, video, SEO and ads.

hero.title: VIRAL
hero.subtitle: Websites, stores, content and ads that make your brand impossible to ignore.

items.title: Website Design & Development
items.body: High-performing websites built to look sharp, load fast and convert visitors into clients — from presentation sites to custom platforms.
points: Responsive design for mobile, tablet and desktop
Clean architecture with strong SEO foundations

items.title: Custom Web Applications
items.body: Business tools built around your workflow — dashboards, client portals, booking systems and internal apps that go beyond a standard website.
points: Custom logic for your processes and users
Secure accounts, roles and data flows
Integrations with tools you already use

items.title: E-commerce Stores
items.body: Online stores designed for real sales — clear product flows, smooth checkout and setups that scale with your business.
points: Training so you can manage the store yourself

items.title: Social Media Management
items.body: Consistent content, community and strategy that grow reach and keep your brand active where your audience already scrolls.
points: Creative posts tailored to your brand voice

items.title: Video Production & Editing
items.body: Reels, ads and brand videos edited to stop the scroll — clear storytelling, strong pacing and formats built for social and web.
points: Short-form video for Instagram, TikTok and ads

items.title: SEO & Paid Ads
items.body: Get found and get leads — organic search optimization plus paid campaigns that put your offer in front of the right people.
points: On-page SEO, keywords and technical basics
Google Ads and Meta Ads setup
Landing page alignment for better conversion
Clear reporting on traffic and results

items.title: Brand Copy & Content
items.body: Words that sell — website copy, ads and social captions written to clarify your offer and push people to take action.
points: Tone of voice aligned with your brand

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.intro: From sharp websites to impactful campaigns — explore selected projects that helped brands stand out.

plans.label: Static Website (Monthly)
plans.desc: Flexible payment plans: 12 installments €65/month · 6 installments €125 every 2 months · 3 installments €220 every 4 months. All plans are adjustable depending on your specific requirements.
features: Modern, responsive design optimized for all devices (mobile, tablet, desktop)
Built with Webflow for smooth editing and publishing
Customized style according to your branding (colors, fonts, images)
24/7 Support and updating
Basic SEO setup: Titles, meta descriptions, keywords, and image alt text
Optimized images and code for fast loading times
Advanced SEO available upon request (keyword research, competitor analysis)
Guidance and training for managing your website if needed
5–8 pages included
Google Search Console Integration
Domain & Hosting registration and management
Collaborative Planning & Consultation

about.title: About us
about.lead: Viral Vibe is a two-year-old digital agency from Niš with satisfied clients — we build websites, web apps, content and growth systems that look sharp and convert.
body: For two years we’ve helped brands from Niš and beyond get a clearer online presence, more inquiries and stronger sales through websites, marketing and technical execution.
We combine design, development and marketing in one process — so you don’t jump between freelancers and half-finished work.
Our focus is measurable: Google visibility, trust, inquiries and conversion.

team.title: Graduate engineer of communicology & marketing specialist
team.text: Brand positioning, messaging, campaigns and growth — so the digital presence actually sells.

team.title: Graduate engineer of electrical engineering and computing
team.text: Websites, web apps and technical foundations built to be fast, stable and ready to scale.

cases.title: Case studies
cases.subtitle: Selected projects with the challenge, solution and outcomes.

items.q: What services does your agency offer?
items.a: We provide websites, custom web apps, e-commerce, social media management, video editing, SEO, paid ads and brand copy — end to end.

items.q: How can I start working with your agency?
items.a: Contact us by phone or form. After a short briefing we propose a tailored plan, timeline and budget for your project.

items.q: How much do your services cost?
items.a: We offer flexible packages for websites and e-commerce, including monthly and yearly options. Custom work is scoped after the briefing.

items.q: How long does a typical project take?
items.a: A presentation site often takes a few weeks. E-commerce and web apps depend on complexity. We always share a clear timeline before kickoff.

items.q: Do you work with specific industries only?
items.a: No. We work with small and larger businesses across industries — from construction and healthcare to retail and services.

privacy.p: Viral Vibe is a digital agency based in Niš, Serbia. This policy explains how we handle information collected through our website.
We may collect your name, email, phone number and message content when you submit our contact form, as well as basic technical data such as browser type and pages visited.
We use submitted details to respond to inquiries, improve our services and operate the website. We do not sell personal data.
The site may use essential cookies and analytics tools to understand traffic and improve user experience.
You may request access, correction or deletion of your personal data by contacting us.
For privacy requests, contact us via the form on this website or by phone listed on the Contact page.

terms.p: By using viralvibe.rs you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.
Project scopes, timelines and pricing are defined in separate agreements or proposals before work begins.
Website content, branding and materials on this site belong to Viral Vibe unless stated otherwise. Client project IP is handled per contract.
We strive for accuracy, but we are not liable for indirect damages arising from use of this website.
We may update these terms periodically. Continued use of the site means you accept the updated terms.
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Serbia.
